See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 97790 => 'NCell', 977960 => 'STM Telecom', 977961 => 'Smart Telecom', 977962 => 'Smart Telecom', 977963 => 'NSTPL', 977970 => 'NCell', 977972 => 'UTL', 977974 => 'NDCL', 977975 => 'NDCL', 977976 => 'Nepal Telecom', 977980 => 'NCell', 977981 => 'NCell', 977982 => 'NCell', 977984 => 'Nepal Telecom', 977985 => 'Nepal Telecom', 977986 => 'Nepal Telecom', 977988 => 'Smart Telecom', ];
